Free. Instant. Done.

Type a handle, slide to send. Lands in their account before you've put your phone down. Saturday night, Boxing Day, 3am on a Tuesday — same speed, zero cost. No BSB. No "pending until tomorrow". No card surcharge buried at the bottom of the screen.

Bank transfer 1–3 days
Sorted <2 seconds
PayPal fee 2.6% + 30¢
Sorted fee $0

No BSBs. No drama.

Every account has a @handle. Short, memorable, yours. No more texting Mum for her account number for the fifth time.

Just open it. And send.

No wallets. No seed phrases. No gas fees. Sign in with your number, pick a handle, you're done. We do all the boring bits.

Real Aussie dollars. Real Aussie banks.

Your money sits in tier-1 Australian banks. Backed 1:1, redeemable any time. Not offshore. Not crypto. Just dollars.

Oh, and your balance earns 3.33%.

Money sitting in Sorted earns yield, paid daily. No tier, no minimum, no lock-up. More on that below →

Easy as. Three taps.

Whether it's a $5 coffee debt or splitting rent with three flatmates — same flow, same speed, same zero fees.

01

Top up free

Link your bank once. Move money in instantly via PayID. No card surcharge, no "1% loading fee".

02

Send to @anyone

Type a handle, slide to send. Lands in under two seconds. Saturday night, Christmas morning, doesn't matter.

03

Earn while you wait

Anything sitting in your balance earns 3.33% p.a., paid every morning at 9am. No tier, no hoops.

Always earning.

Same model the neobanks use. Your reserves earn ~4% at tier-1 Aussie banks; we pass most of it back. Watch it tick up live.

  • Paid daily at 9am. Not monthly. Not "when you reach the threshold".
  • No lock-up. No minimum. Spend or send any second.
  • Same rate for everyone. No tiers. No "introductory" rates. 3.33%, full stop.
3.33% p.a.
$1k → +$33.30/yr
$5k → +$166.50/yr
$10k → +$333.00/yr
Paid daily, every morning at 9am.

FAST. FREE. SORTED.

No fees. No BSBs. No three-day waits. Just send.

$0
Fees to send, receive, top up, or hold
1.4 sec
Average tap-to-balance time
24/7
Saturday night, Boxing Day, 3am

Fair dinkum AUD.

Your balance is backed 1:1 by AUDD, the Australian dollar token issued by Novatti under an Australian Financial Services Licence. Reserves sit in tier-1 Aussie banks. Real dollars. Real banks. Real Australia.

Solana's just the rails — fast, cheap, invisible. It's what makes the under-two-second sends possible. You'll never see it.

More about AUDD →

AFSL-regulated
AUDD is issued by Novatti under an Australian Financial Services Licence.
1:1 backed
Every dollar is a real Australian dollar, redeemable any time.
Reserves at home
Tier-1 Aussie banks, not offshore. Earning the RBA cash rate.
Solana rails
Sub-second settlement, fractions of a cent in network cost. We cover it.

Got questions?

No legalese. No fine print. Just the good oil.

How fast is "instant"?
Under two seconds, tap to balance. Not "next business day". Not "between 1–3 business days". Two seconds. Saturday night, Boxing Day, 3am on a Tuesday — same speed.
Do I need a wallet or anything crypto-y?
Nope. Sign in with your phone, pick a @handle, you're in. The Solana settlement layer is just plumbing — same way you don't think about TCP/IP when you send a text. We do the boring bits so you can just send money.
How does the free model actually work?
Same model Wise and Revolut use. Your AUD sits in tier-1 Aussie banks earning interest. We earn the spread between what those banks pay and what we pay you, and that runs the whole show. You never pay a cent in fees. Send. Receive. Top up. All free, forever.
Where's my money actually kept?
In tier-1 Australian bank accounts, backed 1:1 by AUDD — an Australian dollar token issued by Novatti under an Australian Financial Services Licence. Your balance is always redeemable for real AUD, any time. Not offshore. Not in stablecoins of stablecoins. Real Aussie dollars in real Aussie banks.
What about the 3.33% — is it real?
Real, paid daily at 9am, on every dollar in your balance. No tier, no minimum, no lock-up. The rate tracks the RBA cash rate — when the RBA moves, we move with it, fairly and openly. Right now the RBA's at 4.10%, which makes 3.33% comfortable.
Can I send overseas?
Not yet — but soon. We're nailing Aussie P2P first. International sends and a debit card are on the way later this year. Sign up to be first in line.
How do I get money in and out?
PayID, instantly. Top up: send from your bank to your Sorted PayID, lands in seconds. Cash out: send back to your bank, same speed, same zero cost. No card surcharges, no "1% loading fee" hiding at the bottom of the screen.
Who's making this?
A small Aussie team based in Brisbane, who got fed up with money taking three days to move between mates. We operate as an authorised representative under an Australian Financial Services Licence — proper compliance, not a "we'll sort it later" hack.

Right then.

Takes 90 seconds. No card. No catch. Send your first $20 in the same minute you sign up.
